title: Acme — Build Map
subtitle: a tiny SaaS, shipped lean · source of truth: ROADMAP.md
loop: The loop: Sign up → Connect → Get value → Upgrade · the rule: ship one slice end-to-end before the next.

cards.title: Auth + sessions
cards.summary: Email + OAuth sign-in, secure session cookies, per-user data scoping in SQL. Everything authed depends on this.
cards.done: A user signs up, signs out, signs back in; no route returns another user's data.

cards.title: The one core action
cards.summary: The single thing the product exists to do, working end-to-end against real data — no mocks.
cards.done: A real user completes the core action and sees a real result.

cards.title: Dashboard
cards.summary: Show the user their state after the core action: history, status, next step.
cards.done: Returning user lands on a dashboard reflecting their real data.

cards.title: Stripe subscription + paywall
cards.summary: Checkout, webhook-verified entitlements (never trust the client), paywall on the premium path.
cards.done: A sandbox purchase grants access; no offline/cross-user path grants it.

cards.title: Deploy + health check
cards.summary: Live HTTPS URL, env-based secrets, green health endpoint, basic error tracking.
cards.done: Production URL serves the app; secrets live in the host, nothing committed.

cards.title: Team workspaces
cards.summary: Invite teammates, shared data, roles. Deferred until single-user value is proven.
cards.done: An owner invites a member who sees shared workspace data.

cards.title: Public API
cards.summary: Token-auth REST API for the core resource. Gated on a real customer asking for it.
cards.done: A documented, token-authed endpoint returns the user's resource.

cards.title: Onboarding polish
cards.summary: Empty states, first-run checklist, a11y pass. After the core loop converts.
cards.done: First-run users hit a guided empty state, not a blank screen.

shipped.title: Repo + CI + test baseline
shipped.summary: Monorepo, green test runner in CI, formatter + linter wired.
